## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation only
- [ ] 🔧 Internal (refactor, test, tooling — no user-facing change)

## Checklist

<!-- All boxes must be checked before requesting review -->

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Coverage is ≥80% for changed code (`uv run pytest --cov`)
- [ ] I have updated [CHANGELOG.md](../blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I have NOT added a co-author trailer (per project policy)
- [ ] For user-facing changes, I have updated the README/docs accordingly
